overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through Night City's neon-lit streets at night before transitioning onto an elevated highway. The footage features a futuristic car interior with red-lit dashboard, passing palm trees, holographic billboards, and industrial structures while approaching the city center.

events.description: approaching and stopping at red traffic light at intersection
accelerating through intersection as light changes

agents.ego_description: navigating city streets in a futuristic vehicle, stopping at traffic signals and accelerating through intersections

yellow taxi driving ahead on the same road

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street, characteristic of Night City
large illuminated advertisement with holographic display

metal fencing running along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Driving through a neon-lit urban street at night, passing palm trees and futuristic gas stations. The vehicle stops at a red traffic light before accelerating through the intersection, with sparse pedestrian activity visible on sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from city streets to elevated highway ramp

events.description: passing under concrete overpass, entering highway ramp area
accelerating sharply as vehicle enters highway on-ramp

agents.ego_description: merging onto the highway via an on-ramp, increasing speed significantly

notable_agents.action: white truck driving ahead on the highway ramp

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning the road
curved ramp leading up to the main highway
tall concrete walls lining the highway to block noise
tall illuminated buildings visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions from city streets onto a highway ramp, passing under a concrete overpass. Concrete sound barriers appear along the sides as the road elevates, with distant skyscrapers becoming visible on the horizon.

events.description: reaching high speed on the elevated highway, visible motion blur
passing through a highway curve with overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on the elevated highway, navigating gentle curves

notable_agents.action: distant truck traveling in the same direction ahead

entered.detail: elevated roadway structure with multiple lanes
tall textured concrete walls lining both sides of the highway
tall lamp posts illuminating the highway from above
large metal and concrete bridge framework

segments.scene_description: High-speed driving on an elevated highway surrounded by concrete sound barriers. Overhead streetlights illuminate the road while distant skyscrapers grow larger on the horizon. The vehicle maintains a steady high velocity with minimal traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approaching downtown with city skyline

events.description: city neon lights becoming more prominent as downtown approaches
slight deceleration as highway curves toward the city center

agents.ego_description: approaching the city center on the highway, navigating gentle curves while surrounded by urban infrastructure

entered.detail: tall illuminated buildings with neon lighting dominating the skyline
high-rise structures with bright neon signage and window lights

segments.scene_description: The final stretch of highway driving with the city skyline growing dominant. Neon-lit skyscrapers fill the horizon as the vehicle approaches downtown. The road curves gently with concrete barriers giving way to views of the illuminated urban core.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle moves from the neon-lit intimacy of urban streets onto an expansive elevated highway. It begins by cruising past palm trees and futuristic gas stations under the glow of city lights, momentarily pausing at a red traffic light before accelerating through a sparse intersection. As the car gains speed, the scene shifts from the street level toward a highway ramp, passing beneath a heavy concrete overpass. The environment then opens up as concrete sound barriers line the road and the vehicle ascends, finally revealing a horizon dominated by distant, towering skyscrapers.

The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive along an elevated highway that gradually transitions from a sterile industrial corridor into the heart of a neon-lit metropolis. It begins with the vehicle accelerating between concrete sound barriers under the rhythmic glow of overhead streetlights, while distant skyscrapers slowly emerge on the horizon. As the car maintains its velocity, the surrounding concrete walls begin to recede, opening up the perspective to a sprawling urban landscape. The scene then shifts as the road curves gently, allowing the towering, illuminated skyline of the downtown core to dominate the field of view. Finally, the horizon fills completely with glowing skyscrapers as the vehicle merges into the vibrant light of the city center.
